additional_metadata.organizer: dbt Labs (Leona Campbell, Sr Mgr, Product Documentation)

events.agenda: 6:00 Check in/Registration; 6:30 Presentation: "For Builders, by Builders: The Latest Tools from dbt Labs" by Paige Berry + Q&A; 7:00-8:00 Reception.
events.event_description: In this meetup, we'll dive into the latest tools and ideas we've been shipping — what they unlock, how they fit together, and why we built them the way we did. This meetup is designed for builders, thinkers, and tinkerers.
events.location: InterWorks @ Kiln, 1120 Southeast Madison Street, Portland, OR
events.raw_text: Thu, Jun 26, 2025 · 6:00 PM to 8:00 PM PDT. Presentation 1: "For Builders, by Builders: The Latest Tools from dbt Labs" by Paige Berry (dbt Labs) + Q&A.

talks.description: A look at the latest tools shipped by dbt Labs, what they unlock, and why they were built the way they were.
